summary: Frontend testing of iteration 2 features: Profit Calculator rebuild, Orders page Add Order/Import CSV modals, and Connect Store 6-card layout. All 22 specified test cases passed.
critical_code_review_comments: ConnectStore route is /connect (not /connect-store) - sidebar nav links correctly but direct URL /connect-store returns blank page. Minor discrepancy but no user impact.
Orders.jsx and ProfitCalculator.jsx have minor unused import warnings (no functional impact)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 features working: Profit Calculator (platform auto-fill 15%/10%, live calc, red/green profit, Save to Orders), Orders page (Add Order modal with live profit preview, Import CSV drag-drop, search bar), Connect Store (6 cards: Amazon Connected, Flipkart Pending, Shopify/WooCommerce/Custom Website with Connect btn, Manual Entry with Add Order navigating to /orders). Route for Connect Store is /connect not /connect-store.
